approved_proxy_check.name: approved_proxy_check
approved_proxy_check.value: "financial_proxies"."review_status" != 'approved' OR ("financial_proxies"."value" IS NOT NULL AND "financial_proxies"."currency" IS NOT NULL AND "financial_proxies"."unit" IS NOT NULL AND "financial_proxies"."reference_year" IS NOT NULL AND "financial_proxies"."value_usd" IS NOT NULL)

outcomes_materiality_pair_check.name: outcomes_materiality_pair_check
outcomes_materiality_pair_check.value: ("outcomes"."materiality_score" IS NULL AND "outcomes"."materiality_rationale" IS NULL) OR ("outcomes"."materiality_score" IS NOT NULL AND "outcomes"."materiality_rationale" IS NOT NULL)

deletion_request_consistency_check.name: deletion_request_consistency_check
deletion_request_consistency_check.value: ("projects"."deletion_requested_at" IS NULL AND "projects"."deletion_requested_by" IS NULL AND "projects"."deletion_reason" IS NULL) OR ("projects"."deletion_requested_at" IS NOT NULL AND "projects"."deletion_requested_by" IS NOT NULL AND "projects"."deletion_reason" IS NOT NULL)

deletion_consistency_check.name: deletion_consistency_check
deletion_consistency_check.value: ("projects"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "projects"."deleted_by" IS NULL AND "projects"."delete_reason" IS NULL) OR ("projects"."deleted_at" IS NOT NULL AND "projects"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL AND "projects"."delete_reason" IS NOT NULL)

theory_of_change_nodes_outcome_ref_check.name: theory_of_change_nodes_outcome_ref_check
theory_of_change_nodes_outcome_ref_check.value: ("theory_of_change_nodes"."node_type" = 'outcome' AND "theory_of_change_nodes"."outcome_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("theory_of_change_nodes"."node_type" != 'outcome' AND "theory_of_change_nodes"."outcome_id" IS NULL)
